snps.effect_template: APOE ε4 determining SNP. C allele (ε4) increases Alzheimer's risk ~3x per copy.
APOE ε2 determining SNP. T allele (ε2) is protective against Alzheimer's.
Clusterin (CLU) protective variant. T allele reduces AD risk (OR ~0.86 per copy).
PICALM endocytosis gene protective variant. A allele protective against AD.
BIN1 amphiphysin risk variant. G allele increases AD susceptibility.
Complement Receptor 1 risk variant. A allele associated with increased AD risk.
ABCA7 ATP-binding cassette transporter risk variant. Affects lipid transport and AD risk.
CD33 immune cell receptor protective variant. A allele reduces AD risk through neuroinflammation pathways.

recommendation_template: Focus on modifiable risk factors: cardiovascular health, exercise, cognitive engagement, sleep quality. Consider earlier screening discussions with a neurologist if elevated risk.

studies.title: Meta-analysis of 74,046 individuals identifies 11 new susceptibility loci for Alzheimer's disease
studies.finding: APOE ε4 remains strongest common genetic risk factor for late-onset Alzheimer's

studies.title: Common variants at ABCA7, MS4A6A/MS4A4E, EPHA1, CD33 and CD2AP are associated with Alzheimer's disease and amyloid-beta levels
studies.finding: Five new common variants identified through GWAS associated with AD risk and amyloid pathology
